allow: Bash(docker exec mediavortex-postgres sh -c "psql -U mediavortex -c ""ALTER USER mediavortex WITH PASSWORD ''mediavortex'';""")
Bash(docker exec mediavortex-postgres sh -c "psql -U mediavortex -c ""SET password_encryption = ''scram-sha-256''; ALTER USER mediavortex WITH PASSWORD ''mediavortex''; SELECT pg_reload_conf\(\);""")
Bash(docker exec mediavortex-postgres sh -c "psql -U mediavortex -c ""SHOW password_encryption;""")
Bash(docker exec mediavortex-postgres sh -c "psql -U mediavortex -c ""SELECT rolname, rolpassword FROM pg_authid WHERE rolname=''mediavortex'';""")
Bash(docker exec mediavortex-postgres sh -c "tail -5 /var/lib/postgresql/data/log/*.log 2>/dev/null || tail -5 /var/lib/postgresql/data/pg_log/*.log 2>/dev/null || echo ''checking stderr logs''")
Bash(docker exec mediavortex-postgres sh -c "psql -U mediavortex -c ""ALTER SYSTEM SET log_connections = ''on''; ALTER SYSTEM SET log_disconnections = ''on''; SELECT pg_reload_conf\(\);""")
Bash(docker exec mediavortex-postgres sh -c "psql -U mediavortex -c ""SET password_encryption = ''md5''; ALTER USER mediavortex WITH PASSWORD ''mediavortex'';""")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=mediavortex psql -h localhost -U mediavortex -d mediavortex -c "SELECT id, filename, status, dateadded, datestarted FROM transcodequeue ORDER BY dateadded DESC LIMIT 20;")

Bash("C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U mediavortex -d mediavortex -c "SELECT id, filename, status, dateadded, datestarted FROM transcodequeue ORDER BY dateadded DESC LIMIT 20;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=mediavortex "/c/Program Files/pgAdmin 4/runtime/psql.exe" -h localhost -U mediavortex -d mediavortex -c "SELECT id, filename, status, dateadded, datestarted FROM transcodequeue ORDER BY dateadded DESC LIMIT 20;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=mediavortex "/c/Program Files/pgAdmin 4/runtime/psql.exe" -h localhost -U mediavortex -d mediavortex -c "SELECT status, COUNT\(*\) FROM transcodequeue GROUP BY status ORDER BY status;")
